2002June 9, 2002

🇸🇪 Stockholm, Sweden

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Stockholm, Sweden, June 9, 2002 -- June 15, 2002

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2002-06-stockholm-sweden

17 Resolutions

542Plenary
Publish AIC 522 separately and submit for DIS ballot
SC 4 accepts the recommendation of the Change Management Committee to separately publish AIC 522, “Machining Features”, based on the approved NWI for AP 224 and to progress AIC 522 direct to DIS ba...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
541Plenary
Request revision of ISO funding mechanism for SC 4 standards
It is resolved that the ISO funding mechanism for the delivery of standards produced by SC 4 should be revised to be consistent with the ISO funding mechanisms for the delivery of other standards t...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
540Plenary
Require document abstracts prior to ISO publication
SC 4 directs Project Leaders to submit to the Secretariat an abstract for each document, prior to publication by ISO, to comply with the following requirements defined by ISO and published on the S...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
539Plenary
Define guidelines for document availability notifications
SC 4 directs the Secretariat and WG convenors to comply with the TMB request for following elements of document notifications sent by email, as specified in TMB communiqué no. 16 May 2002.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
538Plenary
Transpose the IAI IFC2x Specification as an ISO PAS
SC 4 invites the IAI to submit the IFC2x Platform Specification, along with the final version of the explanatory report, to the Secretariat for letter ballot for publication as an SC 4 PAS, under t...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
537Plenary
Appreciate Secretariat for new SC 4ONLINE website
SC 4 expresses its appreciation of the work done by its Secretariat on the new web site, SC 4ONLINE, and specifically thanks Mr. Robert Kidwell, Mr. Joe Brazy, Mr. Ted Kula, Mr. Steve Mealey, Ms. T...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
536Plenary
Submit NWI proposal on AP219 Inspection planning
SC 4 requests WG 3 to submit a NWI proposal on AP219 -- Inspection planning, no later than March 2003.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
535Plenary
Support ISO/TC 184 Business Strategy and Development task force
SC 4 strongly supports the objectives of the task force created by ISO/TC 184/AG.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
534Plenary
Disband WG 10 and reallocate its responsibilities
SC 4 resolves to disband WG 10, immediately after publication of TS 18876-1 and TS 18876-2.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
533Plenary
Remind member bodies of open leadership positions
SC 4 reminds its member bodies, that the following leadership positions are currently open in the organization: * QC coordinator * QC deputy coordinator * WG 3 deputy convenor * JWG 9 deputy conven...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
532Plenary
Change title and scope of AP239
SC 4 agrees that the title and scope of AP239 shall be changed to read as follows: Title: Application Protocol: Product life cycle support Scope: This part of ISO 10303 will provide extension to th...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
531Plenary
Establish Category A liaison with ASAM
SC 4 approves a Category A liaison with the Association for Standardisation of Automation and Measuring Systems (ASAM), accepts and welcomes Dr. Helmut HELPENSTEIN as the liaison officer between SC...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
530Plenary
Approve new project leaders and editors
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |ISO 10303-235 |Norman Swindells | |ISO 10303 -- PDM Modules | |Pa...

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to those who participated for their outstanding contributions and professionalisms this week to the work of ISO/TC 184/SC 4.

Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere thanks to Tom Warren for his outstanding contribution to the development of quality processes within ISO/TC 184/SC 4 and expresses its hope that he will be successful in ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
